title: Omega Biotek Mag-Bind Viral RNA XPress Kit Protocol
author: Opentrons
materials: Omega Biotek Mag-Bind Viral RNA XPress Kit
Download your protocol and unzip if needed.

steps.title: Pre-cool the Temperature Module in the Opentrons App to 4°C
steps.instruction: Pre-cool the Temperature Module in the Opentrons App to 4°C

steps.title: Add the Binding Mastermix, RMP Buffer,...
steps.instruction: Add the Binding Mastermix, RMP Buffer, Nuclease Free H20, and Lysis Buffer to the 12 well reservoir

steps.title: Create the freshly diluted 80% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Create the freshly diluted 80% ethanol and add it to the 1 well reservoir in slot 2

steps.title: Place the deep well plate filled...
steps.instruction: Place the deep well plate filled with samples on top of the magnetic module in slot

steps.title: Add a 96 well aluminum block...
steps.instruction: Add a 96 well aluminum block and the 96 well PCR plate or PCR strip tubes on top of the Temperature Module in slot 1 The final plate of eluates/extractions will be found on top of the temperature module in slot

steps.title: Explanation of complex parameters below
steps.instruction: Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of Samples`: Select the number of samples for this run. * `Park tips?`: if True for “tiprack parking,” tips used for the same buffers with the same samples will be reused where 1 tiprack turns into a tiprack where used tips are “parked”. This method has low risk of contamination and is highly recommended to avoid pauses to reuse tips. If selected, the parked tiprack slot is on slot 7. * `Elution Volume`: Specify the elution volume for this run. * `P300 Multi-Channel Mount`: Specify which mount (left or right) to host the P300 multi-channel pipette. ---

steps.title: Upload your custom labware to the...
steps.instruction: Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.

steps.title: Upload your protocol file (
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
